notices.title: HaJiMi 0.1.56 greeting fix
notices.message: Pet greeting bubbles now ignore generic model acknowledgements such as 好的, 收到, or OK, then fall back to a real local greeting so timed greetings feel natural again.

notices.title: HaJiMi 0.1.55 remote relay pairing fix
notices.message: This update saves the current cloud relay bridge settings before starting the bridge or generating a pairing code, so cross-network pairing codes are registered against the relay URL you just entered.

notices.title: HaJiMi 0.1.54 remote bridge connection fix
notices.message: Remote bridge pairing now runs through the Electron main process instead of the renderer, avoiding CORS and preload mismatch failures when connecting to LAN or relay hosts.

notices.title: HaJiMi 0.1.53 settings and Skills
notices.message: The office workspace is now the default surface, while models, Skills, channels, and system options live under Settings. Skills management and slash invocation are included.

notices.title: HaJiMi 0.1.52 cloud relay bridge
notices.message: Adds cross-computer cloud relay bridging so one HaJiMi can authorize another HaJiMi to run remote desktop-agent tools across networks. LAN discovery and manual direct addresses remain available.

notices.title: HaJiMi GitHub update feed
notices.message: HaJiMi supports update checks through GitHub Releases and receives announcements through the GitHub JSON notice feed.
